title: Breast Cancer Wisconsin
overview: Wisconsin Diagnostic Breast Cancer (WDBC) dataset. Features computed from a digitized image of a fine needle aspirate (FNA) of a breast mass.
usage_code:
import pandas as pd
url = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/remi-granier/breast-cancer-wisconsin-data/master/data.csv'
df = pd.read_csv(url)
print(df.diagnosis.value_counts())
